the code is typical for deployment scripts.\n- **Conclusion:** The scores are justified.\n\n---\n\n### Overall Evaluation:\n- **Malware Score:** All reports correctly assign 0, as there is no evidence of malicious code.\n- **Obfuscated Score:** All reports assign 0, which is accurate;
